series_metadata.series_description: O.R.C. 3317.08(A)(2) certifications of the tax commissioner on or before the first day of June of each year of the amount to be used in the calculation under that division for the next fiscal year to the department of education and the office of budget and management for each city, local, and exempted village school district that levies a school district income tax and any spreadsheets, data, and/ or calculations determining a certification.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
